pages.title: Crafting Recipes
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)PreFab Upgrade Template$() - Converts a Compact Machine into a PreFab $(li)$(bold)Simulation Wrench$() - Controls PreFab state and opens configuration GUI $(li)$(bold)Importer Block$() - Input gate for factory (place inside CM) $(li)$(bold)Exporter Block$() - Output gate for factory (place inside CM)
